title: citrus × myrtifolia
intro: Citrus × myrtifolia, also known as the lemon myrtle or sweet myrtle, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the family Myrtaceae and is native to Australia. The essential oil extracted from its leaves is known for its antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various infections and wounds. The medicinal properties of citrus × myrtifolia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity, contributing to its health benefits such as improved immune function, reduced stress, and enhanced mood. Citrus × myrtifolia can be prepared as a tea, added to desserts or drinks, or used in aromatherapy, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various purposes.
